title: Place Value Volcano
short_description: Feed digit boulders into the volcano's ones, tens, hundreds and thousands vents — wrong vents get sneezed back in ash.
description: Mount Grinatoa is VERY fussy about its digit boulders: each vent only accepts the digit from the right place — ones, tens, hundreds, thousands, even tenths and hundredths. Feed it the wrong boulder and it sneezes everything back covered in ash. Grade bands ramp from tens and ones in 2-digit numbers, to hundreds and thousands with digit-value questions, to decimals where the tenths vent is small and extremely fussy. A free online place value game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the digit boulder that belongs in the asked place.
